evidence_records.route_decision: B. run 25.10b failure audit for merged/missed, overlap/touching, slot permutation, and three-component rows

evidence_records.main_conclusion: Primary failure is loss imbalance: component existence and coarse geometry learned, but raster/depth supervision did not translate into aligned masks.
evidence_records.route_decision: B. enter 25.11 mask/depth loss rebalance training
B. run 25.11b targeted rebalance or topology-focused failure audit

evidence_records.main_conclusion: 25.11 primarily induced union-over-component merge collapse: union Dice improved while component separation and depth consistency degraded.

evidence_records.route_decision: C. rollback to 25.10 loss mainline and redesign component raster/depth targets before further training

evidence_records.main_conclusion: v1 generator labels are globally consistent, but component-level raster/depth supervision lacks explicit ownership in overlap/touching pixels; target v2 should resolve ownership before further training and return to the 25.10 loss mainline.
evidence_records.route_decision: A. enter 25.13 target-v2 training gate using the 25.10 loss mainline; do not use the 25.11/25.12 rebalance stack
C. return to generator/label schema; do not continue loss tuning

evidence_records.main_conclusion: 25.13 target-v2 collapse is not caused by empty v2 components or broad generator corruption; the current hard binary component-local labels are too sparse/unsupported for stable mask learning, so derive label schema v3 soft/valid-region targets in PINN_project before any further training.
evidence_records.route_decision: A. enter 25.14 label-v3 derivation + validator, no training

evidence_records.main_conclusion: Label-v3 can be derived inside PINN_project from existing raw component masks/depths: hard ownership remains unique, union/depth invariants remain intact, and soft/local valid-region support substantially increases the component-mask learning signal that collapsed under target-v2.
evidence_records.route_decision: A. enter 25.15 label-v3 training gate using 25.10 loss mainline + label-v3 supervision; do not use the 25.11/25.12 rebalance stack
C. return to label-v3 derivation or generator/export schema; do not continue loss tuning

evidence_records.main_conclusion: 25.15 label-v3 relieved near-empty masks but converted the failure into union-like merged masks: soft/valid support is too broad relative to component identity, while raw labels remain sufficient for a stricter v3b derivation.
evidence_records.route_decision: A. enter 25.16 label-v3b derivation + validator, no training

evidence_records.main_conclusion: Label-v3b is derivable inside PINN_project from existing raw masks/depths: it keeps v2-style exclusive hard identity, adds capped narrow soft halo support to avoid v2 near-empty sparsity, and removes the broad v3 union-like support leakage.
evidence_records.route_decision: A. enter 25.17 label-v3b training gate using 25.10 loss mainline + label-v3b supervision; do not use the 25.11/25.12 rebalance stack
B. enter 25.17b label-v3b failure audit focused on hard-core/halo/SDF/depth-valid-region usage

failure_attribution_ranked.cause: per-component raster ownership main supervision mismatches MFL observability
failure_attribution_ranked.evidence: Exclusive ownership collapses toward near-empty masks, while softened support collapses toward union-like merged masks.

failure_attribution_ranked.cause: touching / overlap / three-component cases amplify component identity ambiguity
failure_attribution_ranked.evidence: 25.10-25.17 audits repeatedly isolate touching, overlap, and three-component subsets as unstable.

failure_attribution_ranked.cause: loader/loss/matching risk remains worth auditing but is not a reason to continue raster-target tuning
failure_attribution_ranked.evidence: 25.17 requires a failure audit of hard-core/halo/SDF/depth-valid-region usage, but the route-level pattern spans v2, v3, and v3b.

geometry_primary_component_set_design.forward_consistency: geometry slots -> derived profile/mask/depth -> lightweight forward surrogate or feature-space residual -> Bx/By/Bz residual; COMSOL is not placed inside the training loop.
geometry_primary_component_set_design.supervision_boundary: per-component raster targets may remain auxiliary diagnostics or weak supervision, but are no longer the main loss.

preserved_routes: raw labels and COMSOL top-up dataset as evidence/source data

roadmap.route: geometry-primary component-set design + label derivation plan
geometry-derived mask/depth evaluator + forward-consistency surrogate plan

route_decision: A. enter 25.19 geometry-primary component-set design + label derivation plan; no training
route_reset_main_conclusion: Stop the per-component raster-target mainline and move to geometry-primary component-set design.

stopped_routes.evidence: 25.13 target-v2 training gate FAIL: ownership cleanup removed duplicate/overlap conflict but produced near-empty mask collapse.
25.15 label-v3 training gate FAIL: soft support relieved sparsity but produced union-like merged collapse.
25.17 label-v3b training gate PARTIAL: near-empty was partly relieved, but merged_rate remained 1.000000.
25.11/25.12 rebalance attempts either caused merge collapse or failed; the route now points away from raster-target main supervision.
stopped_routes.route: loss rebalance / label-v4 raster-target tuning as the mainline
